PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("ScadaEngine.Web\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\ScadaEngine.Web.dll"\); function Find-Str\($s\) { $pat = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetString\([System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes\($s\)\); $needle = [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode.GetBytes\($s\); $hay = $bytes; for \($i = 0; $i -le $hay.Length - $needle.Length; $i++\) { $ok = $true; for \($j = 0; $j -lt $needle.Length; $j++\) { if \($hay[$i+$j] -ne $needle[$j]\) { $ok = $false; break } }; if \($ok\) { return $true } }; return $false }; "emMainMeter\(舊有元素,對照組\): " + \(Find-Str 'emMainMeter'\); "emMeterInfoRow\(新元素\): " + \(Find-Str 'emMeterInfoRow'\))

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5038/js/energymeter.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + "  長度=" + $r.Content.Length; if \($r.Content -match 'emMeterInfoRow'\) { "伺服器送出的 energymeter.js 是新版（含 emMeterInfoRow）" } else { "伺服器送出的 energymeter.js 是舊版" }; $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5038/js/role-aliases.js" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "role-aliases.js: HTTP " + $r2.StatusCode)
